subcodes.first_line: O newly-risen stars in the garden of God's love! At every moment art thou remembered and present in thought, and verily, with heart and soul, art thou in my presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نوکل ریاض محبت الله در هر دم در یاد و خاطری و فی الحقیقه بجان و دل در محضر
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
